title: helichrysum forsythii
intro: Helichrysum forsythii, also known as the mountain everlast or mountain everlasting, is a species of flowering plant within the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, due to its high content of sesquiterpene and terpene compounds. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting the immune system, while also having potential applications in wound healing and as an antispasmodic. Helichrysum forsythii can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
